# Zerobit-io

Trade peer-to-peer on ZeroBit — the Stellar marketplace where every deal is protected by trustless escrow. No middlemen. Near-zero fees. Just two parties and the blockchain.

---

## What We Are Building

ZeroBit is a decentralized P2P marketplace built on the Stellar blockchain. Buyers and sellers trade directly — goods, services, rentals, freelance work, and more. Every transaction is automatically protected by a smart escrow contract powered by the TrustlessWork SDK. Funds lock on-chain when a buyer orders. They release when delivery is confirmed. No platform holds your money.

---

## Repositories

| Repo | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [zero-bit](https://github.com/Zerobit-io/zero-bit) | Main monorepo — frontend, API, infrastructure |

---

## Tech Stack

Next.js 14 · TypeScript · Stellar Network · TrustlessWork SDK · Hasura GraphQL · PostgreSQL · Firebase Auth · Express · Tailwind CSS · Docker · Turborepo
